parsed_output.justification: The discussion is dominated by accusations that point to James as the lone werewolf, with several players claiming he is the only one who can be killed to stop the threat. No other player has presented convincing evidence of being a werewolf, and the majority of statements revolve around James’s alleged role. Eliminating James is the most likely action to remove a werewolf and help Team Village win.
